MANOSABA-SFX_SETTINGS.title: SFX Settings
MANOSABA-LABOURS_OF_HIRO_EFFECT_FREQUENC: Choose how often Labours of Hiro plays its special SFX/VFX: every time, once per run, or never.
MANOSABA-DIFFICULTY_SETTINGS.title: Difficulty (Settings must be same for multiplayer!)
MANOSABA-ENABLE_ENEMY_HP_MULTIPLIER.hove: When enabled, enemy max HP is multiplied by the configured percentage.
MANOSABA-ENEMY_HP_MULTIPLIER_PERCENT.hov: Multiplier applied to enemy max HP. 100% means unchanged.
MANOSABA-HIKAMI_MERURU_EXAID_EFFECT_FREQ: Choose how often Hi↗ka↘mi↗ Me↘ru↗ru plays its special SFX: every time, once per run, or never.
